calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Plano ISD in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Plano ISD is Tuesday, August 12, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Plano ISD in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Plano ISD is Friday, May 22, 2026. The school year runs from August through May, covering 171 instructional days — fewer than most Texas districts, achieved through extended daily instructional minutes.

calendarFaqs.q: When is fall break 2025-2026 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall break for Plano ISD runs October 13–17, 2025 — a full week off. Most neighboring DFW districts including Dallas ISD remain in session that week, so this is a Plano-specific break that families coordinating with other districts should note.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Plano ISD runs March 16–20, 2026. An additional staff day falls on March 23, adding a no-school day the Monday after spring break returns.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Plano ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Plano ISD runs December 22, 2025–January 5, 2026 (15 days). January 5 is a staff day; second semester begins Tuesday, January 6, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Short Year
yearNumbers.detail: Plano ISD schedules 171 instructional days — fewer than the 175–180 days most Texas districts run, achieved through extended daily instructional minutes.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Oct 13–17 full-week fall break is longer than Dallas ISD's two-day fall break and distinct from most DFW neighbors who don't take one at all.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is observed as a student and teacher holiday, giving families a long Easter weekend.

calendarNotes: Plano ISD opens the 2025–2026 school year on August 12, 2025, and concludes on May 22, 2026 — a student early release day — completing 171 instructional days organized across four grading periods and two semesters. Fall Break runs October 13–17, a full five-day closure combining Student/Teacher Holidays (Oct 13–15) with Staff Development days (Oct 16–17); students return October 20 for the start of the second grading period. A no-school day falls on November 4 (Staff Development), followed by Thanksgiving Break running the full week of November 24–28. Winter Break begins December 22 — with December 19 as the early-release last day of first semester — and students are off through January 5 (a Staff Day), with the second semester starting January 6. Martin Luther King Jr. Day (January 19) is observed as a school holiday. Spring Break runs March 16–20, 2026, with an additional no-school day on March 23 (Staff Development), and Good Friday (April 3) is observed as a Student and Teacher Holiday. The school year concludes May 22, 2026.
